creator: staffer.parry.0e@icloud.com
text:
Created attachment 253780
Patch: Update to 3.5.1

Upstream changes affecting build:

 * modules are no longer vendored
 * man pages are now built with asciidoctor
 * new man pages have been added

While here fix typo in pkg-message
